data.title: What to Expect from Acme United's Earnings
Novo Nordisk's Weight Loss Drug Ozempic Associated With Reduced Opioid, Alcohol Use Disorder Incidences, Study Shows
data.description: A study found that prescriptions for GIP/GLP-1 RA drugs may reduce opioid overdose and alcohol intoxication rates in patients with OUD and AUD, offering potential new treatments for addiction.

data.title: Elon Musk Mourned Tesla's Lack Of Market Share In Japan In January; EV Giant Now Opens 600th Supercharger Post In Country
data.description: Tesla has opened a supercharger station at Enshu Morimachi in the town of Mori, Shizuoka Prefecture in Japan that includes its 60,000th supercharger post around the world, the company said on Wednesday.

data.title: Amid Nvidia's Stratospheric Rally, Billionaire Investor Druckenmiller Regrets Cashing Out Of AI Stalwart's Stock: 'I'm Licking My Wounds From A Bad Sale'
data.description: Nvidia has been an excellent bet for those who reposed faith in the company to make it big amid the AI craze.
